query:
-- Contar dados por company
SELECT 
  'companies' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT id) as ids
FROM companies
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'users' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT companyId) as ids
FROM users
GROUP BY companyId
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'sales' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT companyId) as ids
FROM sales
GROUP BY companyId
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'historicalSales' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT companyId) as ids
FROM historicalSales
GROUP BY companyId
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'commissions' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT companyId) as ids
FROM commissions
GROUP BY companyId
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'brokers' as tabela,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT companyId) as ids
FROM brokers
GROUP BY companyId
